---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Use Cases
Who would benefit from this feature? Provide specific examples.

## Alignment with DevAudit Principles
How does this align with DevAudit's core principles?
- [ ] Education First - Teaches users
- [ ] Privacy By Default - 100% local, no telemetry
- [ ] Transparency - Honest, no fear tactics
- [ ] Empowerment - User control, not surveillance

## Implementation Ideas
(Optional) Technical suggestions for how to implement this

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools
